{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Moongrave amphelia
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave amphelia]] trees flourish in abundant [[shadow aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moongrave amphelia]] trees were initially taken from [[Everwood]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“They flourish in abundant shadow aura,” said Justice,<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
